_comment: Reference template for the LaMetric Developer Portal — not a loadable file.
_comment2: Enter these values manually at https://developer.lametric.com.
_comment3: Poll apps can't take the host as a user setting, so the URL is a literal — replace the IP/port with your own server's LAN address. Create the app as Private.
name: Claude Usage
description: Shows Claude AI usage limits (5-hour session and 7-day weekly) from a self-hosted server on your LAN. No cloud, no shared backend.

frameIcon._comment: Store/preview icon only — at runtime icons come from the server's frames.
frameIcon.name: hourglass
